category_sources: Official libxslt reference manual describes it as the XSLT C library developed for GNOME.
source_facts.description says libxslt is a C XSLT library for GNOME.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME documentation uses libxslt as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Pages site also provides the libxslt tutorial.
Official GNOME Pages site provides the libxslt reference manual.
repo_sources: Official GNOME project sources host libxslt releases, and the GNOME GitLab project is the upstream source-control repository.
source_facts.source-archive is hosted under official GNOME sources for libxslt.
tags_sources: Official libxslt reference manual says it implements XSLT and is based on libxml2.
source_facts.description identifies C XSLT library for GNOME.
